title: 10 health benefits of Euphorbia esula (leafy spurge)
intro: Euphorbia esula has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The plant's sap contains resinoids that exhibit analgesic and antiseptic effects, making it effective in soothing skin irritations, wounds, and even toothaches. For example, a poultice made from leafy spurge can help reduce swelling and promote healing in cases of sprains and strains, improving mobility and quality of life for individuals with musculoskeletal conditions.
